reviews.review_msg: Super anal about plagiarism, had her for tutorial leader as well and she would make you sign a consent form about the issue of "I will not cheat". She has high expectations, 1st year students will probably have a hard time in her class coming out of gr.12

Hardest marker ever. This class will ruin your self-esteem when it comes to writing essays and exams. She tries to be funny, but she's completely horrible. Her jokes suck! Avoid this prof if you don't want to receive bad marks - seriously.

I thought she was a fantastic prof! Tried her best making leactures interesting. However, I think your TA is your best bet to get a good mark! My TA was awesome so I got quite a good mark. Avoid her tutorial. I would take her class again! Exams are very straight forward :)

Way too strict and expectations are way too high for a 100 level English course. Not to be rude or anything, but the whole "what is the significance, what are the implications" is going way over. The books are boring in the first place, and setting the bar that high is just tormenting the students. The TAs were not helpful in terms of assignments.
Her expectation are ridiculous! Unless you are a very talented writer, you would hate this class. If you are a decent writer, then this class will smash your self esteem and your GPA.
I didnt like her at all
Do not ever take her class! She is unfair and her lectures are useless and irrelevant!

God she's awful. Not to be rude, but she makes the class way more difficult than it needs to be. I have taken other 1st year English classes before, but she has set the bars way too high in her class when it comes to the Essays. If you essay has the quality of a B paper and 1 quality of a C paper u end up with a C for the paper and thats that!
